emergency_definition: An active sprinkler discharge or a fire alarm going off.
call_transfer_rules: If the on-call technician does not pick up within 60 seconds, inform the caller that someone will call them back shortly.
integration_constraints: Use ServiceTrade; do not create sprinkler jobs automatically (must be handled manually).
after_hours_flow_summary: Emergencies (sprinkler discharge or fire alarm) are routed to an on-call technician with a 60-second failover to a callback promise. Non-emergencies are deferred until the next business morning.
